title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Indian Stamp Act, 1899. 1[(2) It extends to the whole of India 2***: Provided that it shall not apply to 3[the territories which, immediately before the 1st November, 1956, were comprised in Part B States] (excluding the State of Jammu and Kashmir) except to the extent to which the provisions of this Act relate to rates of stamp-duty in respect of the documents specified in Entry 91 of List I in the Seventh Schedule to the Constitution]. (3) It shall come into force on the first day of July, 1899.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 43 of 1955, s. 3, for sub-section (2) (w.e.f. 1-4-1956). 2. The words "except the State of Jammu and Kashmir" omitted by Act 34 of 2019, s. 95 and the Fifth Schedule (w.e.f. 31-10- 2019). 3. Subs. by the A.O. (No. 2) 1956, for "Part B States".
